meta.title: Cash Workspace | Finance templates for freelancers and small businesses
meta.description: Pick a finance template and get a ready Cash Workspace for invoices, expenses, forecasts, documents, fiscal folders, and accountant-ready exports.

hero.title: Your finances, in one workspace.
hero.subtitle: Pick a template and start with a structured finance system: invoices, expenses, forecasts, documents, fiscal folders, and accountant-ready exports.
hero.previewSubtitle: Ready workspace installed from a template

socialProof.headline: Credibility based on the product, not borrowed logos.

templatesSection.heading: Templates are the fastest way to a working finance system.
templatesSection.subheading: Start with a workspace designed for how you operate. Each template defines categories, fiscal folders, dashboard structure, and the workflows you need next.
templatesSection.allFree: Start with the Freelancer template today. More templates are being prepared for small businesses, agencies, tax exports, and forecasting.

productSections.heading: Everything organized around cash operations.
productSections.subheading: Cash Workspace is accounting-lite: structured enough for fiscal discipline, simple enough to use every week.

invoices.title: Invoices by direction
invoices.body: Separate incoming sales invoices from outgoing supplier bills, then group them by fiscal year for cleaner tax work.

expenses.title: Expenses with context
expenses.body: Track vendors, categories, dates, and payment status without turning operational spend into another loose spreadsheet.

forecast.title: Simple yearly forecast
forecast.body: Plan expected income, expected expenses, and projected net so decisions are grounded in cash, not guesswork.

documents.title: Fiscal folders and exports
documents.body: Keep documents tied to financial records and prepare accountant-ready fiscal folder structures when tax season arrives.

workflow.heading: From template to accountant-ready export.
workflow.subheading: The workflow is deliberately structured: install once, operate weekly, export cleanly.

install.title: 1. Install a template
install.body: Choose the Freelancer template and get categories, folders, dashboard widgets, and forecast structure in your workspace.

operate.title: 2. Run financial operations
operate.body: Manage clients, invoices, supplier bills, expenses, documents, and forecast assumptions from one structured place.

export.title: 3. Prepare fiscal handoff
export.body: Group invoices and documents by fiscal year and direction so an accountant can review the right package faster.

features.heading: Built like financial infrastructure, presented like a clean workspace.
features.subheading: Simple on the surface. Strict about tenancy, retries, exports, and auditability underneath.

isolated.title: Workspace-isolated
isolated.body: Multi-tenant from day one. Row-level security in Postgres — your data can't leak across workspaces, even if the app code has a bug.

atomic.title: Atomic + idempotent
atomic.body: Every invoice, expense, and template install is transactional and safe to retry. No partial writes, no duplicate rows.

taxExport.title: Tax-export ready
taxExport.body: One-click ZIP grouped by fiscal year and direction, with a summary.csv your accountant can open.

audit.title: Audit log built-in
audit.body: Every mutation is logged with before/after snapshots. You see what changed, when, and by whom.

secondaryCta.headline: Start with the Freelancer template.
secondaryCta.subheadline: Get a working finance workspace first, then customize it around how your business gets paid.

shell.automationDescription: Правила платежей, расходов и документов готовы.

errors.idempotencyConflict: Idempotency-Key уже использован с другим телом запроса.

auth.title: Вход
auth.description: Откройте доступ к рабочему пространству, клиентам, счетам, документам и денежному потоку.
auth.notConfigured: Supabase Auth не настроен. Локальная разработка может использовать резервное пространство, но в продакшене нужны переменные Supabase.
auth.authNotConfigured: Supabase Auth не настроен для этой среды.

dashboard.description: Дебиторка, клиенты и счета в одном обзоре.

clients.description: Управляйте платежными отношениями и контактами. Это стартовая точка любого счета.

cashflow.description: Прогноз на 30 дней с чистым движением $24,470.

forecast.title: Годовой прогноз
forecast.description: Задайте простые годовые ожидания по доходам, расходам и чистому результату.
forecast.selectYearDescription: Прогнозы хранятся по рабочему пространству и году.
forecast.forecastDescription: Прогнозируемый результат равен ожидаемому доходу минус ожидаемые расходы.

documents.title: Документы
documents.exportDescription: Подготовьте метаданные папок счетов по финансовому году и направлению денег.
documents.folderStructureDescription: ZIP-экспорт пока не включен. Эти папки будут использоваться при экспорте.
documents.noFolders: Папок счетов пока нет. Создайте счет, чтобы подготовить метаданные экспорта.
documents.invoiceMetadataDescription: Пути хранения сохраняются сейчас; PDF-файлы появятся позже.

templates.title: Шаблоны
templates.description: Повторно используемые настройки для фрилансеров и малого бизнеса.
templates.freelancerTagline: Следите за доходами, расходами и запасом средств в одном месте — для самостоятельной работы.

freelancer.name: Freelancer Finance Dashboard
freelancer.headline: A ready finance dashboard for solo operators.
freelancer.tagline: Track income, expenses, forecast, and fiscal folders in one structured workspace.
freelancer.target: Best for freelancers, consultants, creators, and solo service businesses.
freelancer.bullet1: Prebuilt expense categories for deductible spend
freelancer.bullet2: Incoming invoice workflow with fiscal-year organization
freelancer.bullet3: Tax and contract folders for accountant handoff

smallBusiness.name: Small Business Finance OS
smallBusiness.headline: Cash operations for growing owner-led teams.
smallBusiness.tagline: Organize vendors, outgoing bills, cashflow, and monthly operating spend.
smallBusiness.target: Best for small teams managing vendors, payroll-adjacent expenses, and recurring bills.

agency.name: Agency Finance Workspace
agency.headline: Client revenue and delivery spend in one workspace.
agency.tagline: Connect client invoices, project costs, contractors, and margin signals.
agency.target: Best for studios, agencies, and service teams with multiple active clients.

taxExport.name: Tax / Accountant Export Pack
taxExport.headline: A cleaner fiscal handoff for tax season.
taxExport.tagline: Group invoices, bills, receipts, and summaries by fiscal year and direction.
taxExport.target: Best for operators who want a clean accountant review package.

forecast.name: Financial Forecast
forecast.headline: A practical forecast without a finance team.
forecast.tagline: Plan expected income, expenses, projected net, and runway assumptions.
forecast.target: Best for teams that need forward visibility without complex accounting.
